title: Sync Plans Response
description: Response from syncing campaign plans. Returns status and active validation categories for each plan.

status.description: Sync result status. 'active' means sync succeeded; 'error' means sync failed.

categories.description: Validation categories active for this plan.

status.description: Whether this category is active for this plan.

resolved_policies.description: Policies the governance agent will enforce for this plan. Includes explicitly referenced policies from the brand compliance configuration and auto-applied policies matched by jurisdiction or policy category. Present when the governance agent supports policy resolution.

source.description: How this policy was included. 'explicit': referenced in the brand compliance configuration. 'auto_applied': matched automatically by jurisdiction or policy category.

reason.description: Why this policy was included (e.g., 'Matched jurisdiction US and policy category pharmaceutical_advertising').

replayed.description: Set to true when this response is a cached replay returned for an idempotency_key that was already processed. Set to false (or omitted) when the request was executed fresh. Buyers use this to distinguish cached replays from new executions — matters for billing reconciliation, audit logs, and any downstream system that assumes exactly-once event semantics. Only present on responses to mutating requests that carry idempotency_key.
